criteria.name: Personalized Recommendations
criteria.description: The app uses AI to provide product suggestions tailored to the user's preferences and past behavior.
criteria.sources: shopdev, Nosto, Octane AI, Bold Brain

criteria.name: AI-Powered Chatbots/Assistants
criteria.description: The app incorporates AI chatbots to assist customers with product searches, answer questions, and provide support.
criteria.sources: Tidio AI, Infichat, shopdev, Lyro AI Chatbot

criteria.name: Visual Search
criteria.description: The app allows users to search for products using images, either taken with their camera or uploaded from their device.
criteria.sources: Google Shopping, GoFind.ai, Neiman Marcus's Snap. Find. Shop.

criteria.name: Price Comparison
criteria.description: The app compares prices from different retailers to help users find the best deals.

criteria.name: Style Recommendations
criteria.description: The app provides style recommendations based on user preferences and AI-generated looks.

criteria.name: Seamless Integration
criteria.description: The app seamlessly integrates with other platforms and tools, such as e-commerce platforms and marketing automation systems.

criteria.name: AI-driven personalization
criteria.description: AI analyses customer data to create personalized marketing campaigns and shopping experiences.

criteria.name: Customer support automation
criteria.description: AI helps automate customer support through chatbots and other tools
